content.en:
True River Valley.

Located in the True River Continent, this is a small Void Continent with no resources, and the territory of the True River Valley is also very small, and it occupies very few treasure lands, and the most valuable one belongs to the True Pole Land.

However, it is also because the True Pole Land is more dangerous that those powerful forces are too lazy to occupy it.

In addition, the True River Valley has also taken refuge in some powerful forces, so it can be preserved.

After entering the True River Valley, Ye Tian knew that even if he entered the True River Valley, it was not easy to obtain the Supreme Dao Secret Technique, and it was impossible for the True River Valley to give him the Supreme Dao Secret Technique for free, and he needed to exchange it with contribution points.

There is no way, if the True River Valley gives the Supreme Dao Secret Technique for free, then the True River Valley will not even have room to survive.

It is precisely because a lot of contribution points are needed that those members will continue to do tasks in order to exchange for the secret art of the Dao, collect a large number of resources needed by the True River Valley, and make the wealth of the True River Valley continue to increase, so that there is hope to grow the True River Valley.

In this regard, Ye Tian expressed his understanding.

"One million contributions!"

Ye Tian saw several Supreme Dao secret techniques, all of which were at this price.

The Supreme Dao Stone can only be exchanged for 100 contribution points, which means that if you want to obtain the Supreme Dao Secret Technique, you must find at least 10,000 Supreme Dao Stones!

For those Nine-Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlords, it would take an endless long time to collect materials like 10,000 Supreme Dao Stones!

"No wonder there are so many Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords in True River Valley, and there are only so few Supreme Dao Realm powerhouses, I'm afraid that many of them have not been exchanged for the Supreme Dao Secret Technique!" Ye Tian guessed.

For him, it's really not difficult to get together a million contribution points.

He could have entered the True Pole Land again to find materials, although it was a bit dangerous, and there were also True Extreme Dao Worms that could kill him, but it was nothing for him to lose a copy body, so he could naturally collect it slowly.

It won't be long before he can scrape together a million contributions.

Subsequently.

He took on the task of going to the True Pole as a member of the True River Valley.

......

True Pole.

Ye Tian entered here again, he still copied several copy bodies, and then went to collect various materials.

At the beginning, he was very smooth, although he was constantly attacked by the True Extreme Dao Worm, but he had not yet encountered the True Extreme Dao Worm that could kill him.

But this time.

One of his replica bodies is in trouble.

Rumble!!!

Several True Dao Dao Worms appeared around, and each one was even larger, the aura of the Supreme Dao Rules contained was stronger, and its strength was much stronger.

Airplanes!!!

They attacked Ye Tian in an instant.

Ye Tian used the Heavenly Poke to attack them, but found that his attack landed on them, leaving only white spots, and he didn't break the defense at all.

"Such a terrifying defense, my Heavenly Poke didn't break it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

There are no such creatures in the realm of reincarnation or the land of eternity, but there are many here.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian kept attacking, but he couldn't help these three True Extreme Dao Worms, and the attacks of these three True Extreme Dao Worms could hurt him.

His body is just an ordinary Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and he can exert terrifying combat power by relying on a divine power like the Supreme Dao Poke that contains the rules of the Supreme Dao, once the attack is useless, his body will naturally not be able to bear it.

Soon.

His duplicate body was besieged and killed by the three True Extreme Dao Worms.

"The True Pole Land is really dangerous, it is difficult to kill the True Extreme Dao Worm here, but it is easy to be killed, even if it is a powerful force, it does not dare to send a large number of Origin Upper Realm Overlords to explore and find resources!"

Ye Tian copied another copy of the body, continued to look for materials, and once he found a lot of materials, he sent them out.

And just like that, the years passed.

Ye Tian collected more and more materials, and before he knew it, several years had passed.

this day.

Ye Tian gathered enough materials and came to the True River Valley to exchange them for contribution points.

When Ye Tian exchanged more than one million contribution points, he shocked the entire True River Valley.

......

In the depths of the True River Valley, in a glorious hall, one by one is sitting in the Dao Realm, and the most powerful one of them is the Dual Dao Realm powerhouse, the True River!

"True River Valley Lord, news has just come that a member of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has only joined not long ago has collected a large amount of materials from the True Pole Land in a short period of time, and exchanged them for more than one million contribution points!"

"It seems that the strength of this Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord is very strong, it should be for the sake of the Supreme Dao Secret Technique to join our True River Valley" True River said: "He actually collected all the contribution points, if it is exchanged for the Supreme Dao Secret Technique, give it to him." If he can become the Supreme Dao Realm, it will also be good for our True River Valley. "

"Yes!"

A strong man in the Dao realm responded to the Dao.

And after Ye Tian collected the contribution points, he also quickly went to exchange them for the Dao Secret Technique.

The secret technique he chose was the Gathering Stars Secret Technique!

Soon, the Gathering Stars Secret Technique was successfully exchanged.

Similarly, to accept the inheritance of the Gathering Stars Secret Art, it is still necessary to make an oath of the Supreme Dao.

But for Ye Tian, this oath couldn't restrain him, he was equivalent to completely obtaining this Star Gathering Secret Technique.

"Hahaha, now the secret technique of gathering stars completely belongs to me, I can teach it to others!" Ye Tian was excited.

In the following days, he began to study the secret technique of contemplating and converging stars.

At this time, he knew what was the meaning of this kind of supreme path secret technique to assist in breaking through, he could absorb the power of the origin and combine it with the supreme path secret text, turning it into a new kind of energy, thus helping him break the shackles.

Different Star Gathering Secret Techniques have different success rates for breakthroughs.

If you don't use the Gathering Stars Secret Technique, just comprehend the rules of the Dao Realm, and then go to the Dao Realm, the success rate will be infinitely lower than zero, and the Gathering Stars Secret Technique can increase the success rate to 10%.

That's right, it's Issei.

Even if you have the Gathering Stars Secret Technique, comprehend the rules of the Dao, and your physical body or origin meets the requirements of impacting the Dao Realm, there is only a 10% chance, and once you fail to break through, you will still die.

"This success rate is too low!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

With a success rate, who would dare to break through those Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords?

Of course, there are also ways to increase the success rate, such as the Infinite Secret Medicine, which directly increases the success rate to eighty percent, which is very high.

Ye Tian is not afraid of falling, even if it is a success rate, he can use the copy body to try again and again.

However, this success rate is only for the normal Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and for his true body copy body, I am afraid that the Star Gathering Secret Technique will not reach the success rate of one percent.

Moreover, he also wanted his son, woman, and wife to impact the Dao Realm in the future, and he was definitely not satisfied with the success rate of the Star Gathering Secret Technique.

So, he had to improve his success rate.

And there are indeed many ways to increase the success rate, and even True River Valley has the means to increase the success rate.
